results.rendered_html:
nici 5 U.
1 To pile up, heap up
2 To cover or fill with, strew, overspread (chiefly in p. p.); nicitaṃ khamupetya nīradaiḥ  Ghaṭ. 1 ; śakuṃtanīḍanicitaṃ bibhrajjaṭāmaṃḍalaṃ  Ś. 7. 11 ;  Bk. 10. 4. 
3 To accumulate, store;  Mu. 6. 17.
